description: End-to-end Pibo Workflow System V1 product skeleton: first-class typed workflows backed by normal Pibo Runtime, durable state, CLI/UI inspection, and explicit V1 boundaries.

userStories.title: Create workflows package and one-node Agent workflow definition
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a minimal workflow definition so that Pibo can validate and run a normal Pibo Runtime agent as the smallest workflow unit.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/workflows with modules for api, registry, types, validation, graph, compiler, runtime, store, xstate, fixtures, and testing or direct equivalents
Add a one-node Agent workflow fixture with id, version, input, output, initial node, and profile pibo-agent
Validate the fixture and reject missing required workflow fields with structured diagnostics
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Persist workflow run identity and status facts
userStories.description: As an operator, I need workflow runs to record identity and status so that runs are inspectable independently of normal session history.
acceptanceCriteria: Workflow run records include workflow id, version, definition hash, owner scope, status, input, output, cursor/current state, timestamps, and failure details when applicable
Workflow run records link to related Pibo Session id when an Agent node creates or attaches to a session
Normal Pibo/Pi session traces remain in existing stores and are not moved into pibo-workflows.sqlite
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Validate schema-bound inputs and outputs at workflow boundaries
userStories.description: As a workflow author, I want invalid JSON input and output rejected so that bad data cannot complete or flow downstream.
acceptanceCriteria: Workflow start validates input against text or JSON input port before execution
Workflow completion validates final output against the workflow output port before marking completed
Invalid JSON input and invalid JSON output produce diagnostics with code, message, severity, and path/node/edge when applicable
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Record typed edge transfer for composed workflows
userStories.description: As a Pibo user, I want output from one node to feed another node automatically so that I do not manually copy and paste data between sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Two-node fixture transfers node A output to node B input through a validated edge
Each transfer records source node attempt, target node, edge id, payload or payload reference, status, and timestamp
Inspection can show the edge transfer for debugging
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add durable human approval workflow path
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want workflow approval gates to survive restart so that human decisions are durable and auditable.
acceptanceCriteria: Human node or command creates a persisted wait token before returning control
Approve, reject, resume, and cancel actions validate token state and payload before changing workflow state
Restart inspection shows pending waits and available actions from persisted records
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Expose core CLI/debug workflow operations
userStories.description: As an operator, I want CLI/debug commands so that I can list, validate, run, inspect, approve, reject, resume, and cancel workflows.
acceptanceCriteria: CLI/debug exposes workflow list, validate, run, inspect, approve, reject, resume, and cancel commands or existing-style equivalents
Commands read the same persisted workflow run and wait-token records used by UI
Command output includes run status, node statuses, validation errors, final output when available, and human actions when waiting
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Show workflow-backed runs in Project UI
userStories.description: As a project reviewer, I want Chat Web/Projects UI to show workflow run status and actions so that I can monitor and control workflows.
acceptanceCriteria: Project UI surface shows workflow id/version/status, node list, current status, final output, validation errors, and available human actions
UI explicitly does not include full visual workflow editor or workflow YAML/JSON import/export product surface in V1
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add XState projection for visualization only
userStories.description: As a product team, I want XState-backed visualization so that workflow state is visible without making XState persisted truth.
acceptanceCriteria: Compiler or xstate module produces deterministic XState projection metadata from Pibo workflow IR
Kernel records remain authoritative for recovery and audit; XState snapshots are optional projections
Projection supports current run state for UI visualization
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
